title: ajania alabasica
intro: Ajania alabasica, also known as Korean angelica, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. The health benefits of Ajania alabasica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or poultice, and has been used in traditional Asian medicine for centuries to promote overall health and well-being.
